theme_notes: PSG beat Arsenal on penalties in today's Champions League final in Budapest; Trump tariff battles (court rulings, EU July 4 deadline, $1,500/household cost); Netanyahu's order to seize 70% of the Gaza Strip; Pope Leo's first encyclical on AI illusions; Britney Spears' DUI reduced to a wet reckless.
settled: Clean slate. Like Arsenal's Champions League trophy cabinet. Stay that way.
All square. The court has ruled. This debt is unconstitutional.
The Pope is worried about AI. One crisis at a time — and this one's gone.
youOwe: Less than Britney Spears' reckless driving fine. And hers got reduced.
Arsenal just blew a Champions League final on one missed penalty. You can't use that excuse.
The tariff refund portal flags amounts this small as rounding errors.
PSG are celebrating in Budapest. You're calculating this at home.
The Pope says AI creates dangerous illusions. Your repayment timeline qualifies.
Britney got a plea deal. No deals here.
Arsenal apparently skipped penalty practice. So did your financial discipline.
Two months of Trump tariff surcharges. Congratulations, you are the tariff.
Britney got 12 months probation. Your partner got 12 months of frustration.
Netanyahu ordered his army to seize 70% of Gaza. Your partner is eyeing this balance.
The trade court struck down blanket tariffs. Your debt got no such ruling.
Iran came to the negotiating table. You couldn't make it to Venmo.
Trump tariffs added $1,500 to the average American's bill this year. You've lapped the field.
PSG won back-to-back Champions Leagues. You've had back-to-back months of excuses.
Trump is renegotiating tariffs with the entire EU. You can't close one transaction.
The EU has until July 4th to comply or face escalation. You have until dinner.
Arsenal have waited 140 years for a Champions League. Your partner's patience just ran out.
This is strategically significant. Netanyahu's generals would understand.
theyOwe: They owe you less than PSG tipped the Budapest hotel concierge tonight.
Tariff refund checks aren't coming until summer. Neither is their payment.
Pocket change. Britney's courthouse parking cost more.
Trump set a July 4th deadline for the EU. Set one for them.
Small enough they'll call it a gift. Britney tried that. See how it went.
Less than Arsenal's PR budget for tonight's damage control.
A flight to Budapest to watch Arsenal lose on penalties costs about this. Both are awful.
More than Britney's fine. She at least copped to what she did.
Trump would call this a very unfair trade deficit. He'd be right.
Iran showed up to peace talks. They can't show up to pay you back.
PSG retained the Champions League. Your partner retained zero accountability.
Pope Leo's encyclical went out to billions. They haven't sent you a text.
Luis Enrique has won the Champions League three times. You've asked three times. Different results.
Courts struck down tariffs across the board. This debt got a special exemption.
Netanyahu seized 70% of a territory in days. They haven't moved on this in weeks.
Britney's DUI became a wet reckless. What they owe you hasn't been reduced by one cent.
The trade court deliberated for months. Your patience has deliberated long enough.
PSG win on penalties. You can win on persistence. Start the enforcement proceedings.
